reason: Q 'Дія даного дорожнього знака не поширюється:' answer 5 = all three exceptions apply (servicing enterprises in zone; trucks with diagonal white stripe or carrying groups of people; vehicles of citizens living/working in zone). The diagonal-white-stripe-truck exception applies ONLY to sign 3.3 'No trucks', so all-three uniquely identifies it. Official SVG from Wikimedia Commons (File:UA road sign 3.3.svg) + rendered 320px PNG; verified to show a black truck silhouette in a red-bordered white circle.
